text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper with this title is real and was published at **CVPR 2023** (not ECCV 2024), authored by Shicai Wei, Chunbo Luo, and Yang Luo — completely different from the cited authors (F. Zheng, R. Li, W. Xu). This is a classic "grafted" hallucination: a real paper title attached to fabricated authors and a wrong venue/year.
LINK: https://openaccess.thecvf.com/content/CVPR2023/html/Wei_MMANet_Margin-Aware_Distillation_and_Modality-Aware_Regularization_for_Incomplete_Multimodal_Learning_CVPR_2023_paper.html
